title: Contributing to tezr
text: Thank considering contributing package!

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Fork repository Clone fork: git clone https://github.com/-username/tezr.git Create branch: git checkout -b feature/-feature-name

title: Contributing to tezr
code: # Install development dependencies install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_dev_deps()

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Write code following existing style Document functions roxygen2 comments Add tests new functionality Run checks locally:
code: devtools::document()  # Update documentation devtools::test()      # Run tests devtools::check()     # Run R CMD check

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Use 2 spaces indentation Follow tidyverse style guide Keep lines 80 characters possible

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Add tests tests/testthat/ Use testthat edition 3 syntax Ensure tests pass submitting

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Document exported functions Include examples run without errors Update NEWS.md user-facing changes

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Ensure devtools::check() passes errors, warnings, notes Commit changes clear messages Push fork Open pull request

title: Contributing to tezr
text: Open issue questions discussions.

title: Analysis Examples
text: Suppose want track interest topic changed across decades. standard starting point bibliometric analysis. can replace search term topic interest.

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s use search_advanced() search_field parameter set . result tibble matching records year, author, university, metadata.
code: # Search for "iklim değişikliği" (climate change) in thesis titles climate <- search_advanced(keyword = "iklim değişikliği",                            search_field = "all",                            max_search_results = Inf) glimpse(climate) #> Rows: 4,233 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "127833", "211146", "160151", "143999", "64… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Küresel ısınma Avrupa Birliği ve Türkyie",… #> $ title_translation <chr> "Global warming European Union and Turkey",… #> $ author            <chr> "FİKRET MAZI", "PINAR BAL", "AYŞE KAYA DÜND… #> $ university        <chr> "ANKARA ÜNİVERSİTESİ", "MARMARA ÜNİVERSİTES… #> $ year              <int> 2003, 2007, 2005, 2004, 1997, 2008, 2008, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Doktora", "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans", "Yük… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Doctorate", "Doctorate", "Master", "Master… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Türkçe", "İngilizce", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", … #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "English", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Kamu Yönetimi", "Uluslararası İlişkiler", … #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Public Administration", "International Rel… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "0urt544xEr8UdoqaY8b6Hw", "uY6beSruWeTBJHDZ…

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s count theses per year smooth 10-year rolling average. rolling average reveals sustained growth versus one-spikes. can adjust k wider narrower window.
code: # Count theses per year yearly_counts <- climate |>   count(year) |>   arrange(year) |>   mutate(     year_numeric = as.numeric(year),     # 10-year rolling average to smooth yearly variation     rolling_avg = rolling_mean_right(n, k = 10)   )  # Bar chart with rolling average overlay yearly_counts |>    na.omit() |>    ggplot(aes(x = year_numeric)) +   geom_col(aes(y = n), fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.6) +   geom_line(aes(y = rolling_avg), color = "red", linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Change Research in Turkish Universities",     subtitle = "Annual thesis count with 10-year rolling average",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     caption = "Red line: 10-year moving average"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: can split degree type see drives growth. Filter two main types readable plot.
code: # Compare master's and PhD thesis counts over time type_trends <- climate |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(year, thesis_type_en) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year))  type_trends |>    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = thesis_type_en)) +   geom_line(linewidth = 1) +   labs(     title = "Climate Research by Degree Type",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "Degree"   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Suppose want identify universities produce research given field. can replace "Ekonometri" subject list_subjects().

title: Analysis Examples
code: # All econometrics theses, counted by university econ_theses <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri",                                max_search_results = Inf)  uni_counts <- econ_theses |>   count(university, sort = TRUE)  uni_counts |>    head(10) #> # A tibble: 10 × 2 #>    university                        n #>    <chr>                         <int> #>  1 MARMARA ÜNİVERSİTESİ            543 #>  2 İSTANBUL ÜNİVERSİTESİ           272 #>  3 DOKUZ EYLÜL ÜNİVERSİTESİ        262 #>  4 GAZİ ÜNİVERSİTESİ               246 #>  5 ATATÜRK ÜNİVERSİTESİ            121 #>  6 KARADENİZ TEKNİK ÜNİVERSİTESİ   101 #>  7 ÇUKUROVA ÜNİVERSİTESİ            94 #>  8 AKDENİZ ÜNİVERSİTESİ             82 #>  9 BURSA ULUDAĞ ÜNİVERSİTESİ        79 #> 10 SÜLEYMAN DEMİREL ÜNİVERSİTESİ    78

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s create simple bar chart. Horizontal bars make long Turkish university names easy read.
code: uni_counts |>    head(10) |>    ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(university, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Top 10 Universities for Econometrics Research",     subtitle = "Total thesis count (all years)",     x = "Number of Theses",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s compare top four universities 2000 onward.
code: top4_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:4]  # Filter to top 4 universities, 2000 onward uni_trends <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top4_unis) |>   mutate(year = as.numeric(year)) |>   filter(year >= 2000) |>   count(year, university)  uni_trends |>    ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n, color = university)) +   geom_line() +   labs(     title = "Econometrics Research Trends at Top Universities",     subtitle = "2000-present",     x = "Year",     y = "Number of Theses",     color = "University"   ) +   facet_wrap(~university, scales = "free_y") +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +   theme(legend.position = "none")

title: Analysis Examples
text: Let’s assume higher PhD ratio suggests research-intensive program.
code: # Compute PhD share at each top university top_unis <- uni_counts$university[1:10]  degree_comparison <- econ_theses |>   filter(university %in% top_unis) |>   filter(thesis_type_en %in% c("Master", "Doctorate")) |>   count(university, thesis_type_en) |>   pivot_wider(names_from = thesis_type_en, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) |>   mutate(phd_ratio = Doctorate / (Doctorate + Master)) |>    arrange(desc(phd_ratio))  degree_comparison #> # A tibble: 10 × 4 #>    university                    Doctorate Master phd_ratio #>    <chr>                             <int>  <int>     <dbl> #>  1 İSTANBUL ÜNİVERSİTESİ               117    155     0.430 #>  2 ATATÜRK ÜNİVERSİTESİ                 50     71     0.413 #>  3 AKDENİZ ÜNİVERSİTESİ                 31     51     0.378 #>  4 BURSA ULUDAĞ ÜNİVERSİTESİ            28     51     0.354 #>  5 KARADENİZ TEKNİK ÜNİVERSİTESİ        33     68     0.327 #>  6 GAZİ ÜNİVERSİTESİ                    70    176     0.285 #>  7 DOKUZ EYLÜL ÜNİVERSİTESİ             65    197     0.248 #>  8 ÇUKUROVA ÜNİVERSİTESİ                23     71     0.245 #>  9 MARMARA ÜNİVERSİTESİ                121    422     0.223 #> 10 SÜLEYMAN DEMİREL ÜNİVERSİTESİ        14     64     0.179

title: Analysis Examples
text: can extract research themes thesis abstracts keywords. Detail records include keywords_tr, keywords_en, abstract_original, abstract_translation. example fetches details matching theses, slow.

title: Analysis Examples
code: # Search for machine learning theses ml_search <- search_basic("makine öğrenmesi",                           max_search_results = Inf)  # Fetch full details (abstracts, keywords, advisor, PDF URLs) ml_search_sample <- ml_search |>    slice_sample(n = 20)  ml_details <- detail(ml_search_sample$detail_id)

title: Analysis Examples
text: keywords_tr field contains semicolon separated terms. Let’s split , trim whitespace, count.
code: # Parse comma-separated keywords into individual rows keywords <- ml_details |>   filter(!is.na(keywords_tr)) |>   select(thesis_no, keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keywords_tr = str_split(keywords_tr, ";")) |>   unnest(keywords_tr) |>   mutate(keyword = str_trim(keywords_tr)) |>   filter(keyword != "")  # Top 5 keywords keyword_freq <- keywords |>   count(keyword, sort = TRUE) |>   head(5)  keyword_freq |>    ggplot(aes(x = n, y = reorder(keyword, n))) +   geom_col() +   labs(     title = "Most Common Keywords in Machine Learning Theses",     x = "Frequency",     y = NULL   ) +   theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

title: Analysis Examples
text: Save search results disk first fetch. Load later sessions skip network calls. RDS preserves column types CSV useful sharing.
code: # Save after first fetch saveRDS(econ_theses, "econ_theses.rds") readr::write_csv(econ_theses, "econ_theses.csv")  # Load in a later session econ_theses <- readRDS("econ_theses.rds")

title: Analysis Examples
text: large result sets, fetch details batches save batch. protects interruptions — process stops, lose current batch.
code: batch_size <- 50 all_results <- search_basic("panel data")  for (i in seq(1, nrow(all_results), by = batch_size)) {   batch_end <- min(i + batch_size - 1, nrow(all_results))   batch <- all_results[i:batch_end, ]    # detail() uses built-in rate limiting   details <- detail(batch$detail_id)    # Save each batch to disk   saveRDS(details, paste0("details_batch_", i, ".rds"))    # Optional short pause between batches   Sys.sleep(2) }

title: Analysis Examples
text: tezr uses built-2-second rate limit request setup. detail() fetches uncached records parallel (5 active requests), large jobs can still take time. Process batches cache results possible.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_basic() searches National Thesis Center (NTC) database keyword. checks fields default, works well know term appears. output tibble one row per thesis.
code: # Search all fields for "tarımsal sulama" ag_irrigation <- search_basic("tarımsal sulama") #> ℹ Initializing session... #> ℹ Searching for: tarımsal sulama #> ✔ Found 384 results #> ✔ Returning 384 results # Column names and types dplyr::glimpse(ag_irrigation) #> Rows: 384 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "678523", "919922", "726765", "537790", "47… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Edirne ilinde tarımsal sulamada güneş ener… #> $ title_translation <chr> "Solar energy use in agricultural irrigatio… #> $ author            <chr> "UMUT KUZUCU", "RACİ NAR", "HALİS GAZİ HIZ"… #> $ university        <chr> "TRAKYA ÜNİVERSİTESİ", "BATMAN ÜNİVERSİTESİ… #> $ year              <int> 2021, 2025, 2022, 2018, 2017, 2016, 2005, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Yüksek Lisans", "Yüksek Lisans", "Yüksek L… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Master", "Master", "Master", "Master", "Ma… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Tü… #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Enerji", "Elektrik ve Elektronik Mühendisl… #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Energy", "Electrical and Electronics Engin… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "nktAch3WU1vxJbennA4Q0Q", "gQPyaJRMGYgVAtEp…

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can use search_field argument restrict matching single field. Available search field values : "" (default), "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "thesis_no".
code: # Search only in thesis titles ag_irrigation_title <- search_basic(   "tarımsal sulama",    search_field = "title") #> ℹ Searching for: tarımsal sulama #> ✔ Found 57 results #> ✔ Returning 57 results dplyr::glimpse(ag_irrigation_title) #> Rows: 57 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "991710", "866871", "728942", "624355", "62… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Sustainability of wastewater recycling and… #> $ title_translation <chr> "Tarımsal sulamada atıksuyun geri dönüşümü … #> $ author            <chr> "BORA OKAN", "İRFAN ÖKTEM", "YAKUBU ABDULLA… #> $ university        <chr> "İZMİR YÜKSEK TEKNOLOJİ ENSTİTÜSÜ", "ADANA … #> $ year              <int> 2026, 2024, 2022, 2020, 2020, 2018, 2025, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans", "Doktora", "Yük… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Doctorate", "Master", "Doctorate", "Master… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "İngilizce", "İngilizce", "İngilizce", "İng… #> $ language_en       <chr> "English", "English", "English", "English",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Ziraat; Çevre Mühendisliği", "Elektrik ve … #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Agriculture; Environmental Engineering", "… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "3ZJCyPlL-NMTf4lsy4ai-w", "9c0Tkkgm7aOsztyU… # Search abstracts abstract_search <- search_basic(   "production function",    search_field = "abstract")  # Search by author name author_search <- search_basic(   "Işıl Şirin Selçuk",    search_field = "author")  # Search by thesis number number_search <- search_basic(   "889301",    search_field = "thesis_no")

what: Filtering by Thesis Type and Access Status
title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_basic() also accepts thesis_type access_type filters. filters applied server-side, download fewer records. Available thesis_type values : "" (default), "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Available access type values : "" (default), "open", "restricted".
code: # PhD dissertations only phd_results <- search_basic(   "ekonometri",    thesis_type = "phd") #> ℹ Searching for: ekonometri #> ✔ Found 2005 results #> ! Server limit: returning 2000 of 2005 results. Set `max_search_results = Inf` to auto-paginate. dplyr::glimpse(phd_results) #> Rows: 2,000 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "741760", "441334", "291611", "847927", "58… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Hisse senedi fiyat tahmininde ekonometrik … #> $ title_translation <chr> "Comparison of econometric and machine lear… #> $ author            <chr> "KORAY YAPA", "FATMA İDİL BAKTEMUR", "FATMA… #> $ university        <chr> "UŞAK ÜNİVERSİTESİ", "ÇUKUROVA ÜNİVERSİTESİ… #> $ year              <int> 2022, 2016, 2011, 2024, 2019, 2014, 2008, 1… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Doktora", "Doktora", "Doktora", "Doktora",… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Doctorate", "Doctorate", "Doctorate", "Doc… #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "İn… #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Ekonometri; İşletme", "Ekonometri", "Ekono… #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Econometrics; Business Administration", "E… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "mrKjRVZdXarSz-8InkP-Yg", "Y4MY10XzD7cdMim7… # Open access theses only open_results <- search_basic(   "hanehalkı",    access_type = "open")

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Basic search exceed 2000 results. server-side limit. query returns 2000 records, function warns . cases, can set max_search_results = Inf paginate past limit. search_basic() automatically delegates advanced search pagination set max_search_results = Inf. information pagination .
code: # This stops at 2000 climate_change <- search_basic("climate change")  # Delegate to advanced search with auto-pagination climate_change_all <- search_basic(   keyword = "climate change",   max_search_results = Inf )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_advanced() adds year range, language, group, university/institute, thesis status filters keyword search. NTC advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. search_advanced() exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), often pass Boolean logic single query string (example, "term1 term2"). NTC accept free-form Boolean strings. uses structured form fields keyword row, pattern applicable . keep interface simple, search_advanced() expose Boolean row combinations. equivalent results, can use following approaches. : Use search_detailed() field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : Run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : Run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
code: # Keyword search with year range recent_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 )  # English-language theses only # language accepts ISO 639 codes ("tr", "en", "fr", "de", ...), or # full names ("Turkish", "French") english_growth <- search_advanced(   keyword = "economic growth",   language = "en" )  # French-language theses french_theses <- search_advanced(   keyword = "migration",   language = "fr" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: group limits results broad group: "" (default), "science" (Fen Bilimleri), "social" (Sosyal Bilimler), "medical" (Tıp ve Sağlık Bilimleri). status controls whether results include approved theses also -preparation ones: "approved" (default), "", "in_preparation".
code: # Social sciences only social_econ <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   group = "social" )  # In-preparation theses (not yet defended) ongoing_ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   status = "in_preparation" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can combine filters build precise keyword queries. Start minimal query, add constraints.
code: # PhD theses in social sciences, open access, 2000-2024 complex_query <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   search_field = "title",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2000,   year_end = 2024,   group = "social",   access_type = "open" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: max_search_results greater 2000 (including Inf) server reports 2000 matches, tezr switches iterative year-range pagination. supply year_start year_end, package uses 1959:current_year search window. creates year chunks weighted split points (pre-2000, 2000-2010, post-2010) safety target hard 2000-row cap. chunk requested filters original query. chunk still capped server limit, chunk split retried range small enough (single year remains). process, tezr updates split weights observed uncapped chunk densities bias later splits toward denser periods. Finally, chunk results merged, deduplicated thesis_no, returned. single year still exceeds 2000 results, package paginate year warns narrow query additional filters.
code: # Retrieve all results (auto-paginate by year) all_eu <- search_advanced(   keyword = "avrupa",   search_field = "all",   year_start = 2018,   year_end = 2020,   max_search_results = Inf ) #> ℹ Performing advanced search... #> ✔ Found 4596 results #> ℹ Auto-pagination: target 4596 results across 2018-2020 #> ℹ Range 2018-2018: 1218 results retrieved. #> ℹ Range 2019-2019: 2000 results retrieved. #> ! Range 2019-2019 has 2298 results but only 2000 returned (server limit). This is a single-year range and cannot split further. Some results were truncated. Add more filters to narrow the search. #> ℹ Range 2020-2020: 1080 results retrieved. #> ✔ Pagination complete: 4298 unique results #> ! Returning 4298 of 4596 results.At least one single-year range exceeded the server limit and cannot split further (years: 2019). Add more filters (for example year, thesis type, university, subject). dplyr::glimpse(all_eu) #> Rows: 4,298 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no         <chr> "505128", "513160", "526658", "516229", "53… #> $ title_original    <chr> "Kalkınma parametresi çerçevesinde Türkiye'… #> $ title_translation <chr> "The place of Turkey in the future of Europ… #> $ author            <chr> "YAKUP KARAKUŞ", "CANER ÖVSAN ÇAKAŞ", "TUĞÇ… #> $ university        <chr> "YÜZÜNCÜ YIL ÜNİVERSİTESİ", "DOKUZ EYLÜL ÜN… #> $ year              <int> 2018, 2018, 2018, 2018, 2018, 2018, 2018, 2… #> $ thesis_type_tr    <chr> "Yüksek Lisans", "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans"… #> $ thesis_type_en    <chr> "Master", "Doctorate", "Master", "Master", … #> $ language_tr       <chr> "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "İngilizce", "Türkçe", … #> $ language_en       <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "English", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr        <chr> "Ekonomi; Uluslararası İlişkiler", "Din; Ul… #> $ subject_en        <chr> "Economics; International Relations", "Reli… #> $ detail_id         <chr> "UaiCHH-mBoLP20zqTCxNIw", "fB_iHRv8HpCJaTpM…

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: search_detailed() provides field-specific institutional filters. Use need target thesis titles, authors, supervisors, universities, divisions, disciplines, subjects. supports auto-pagination flow search_advanced(). Available parameters search_detailed() : thesis_no, title, author, supervisor, abstract, keyword, university, university_id, institute, institute_id, division, division_id, subject, discipline, discipline_id, thesis_type, year_start, year_end, language, access_type, group, status, max_search_results, ignore_cache. provide least one search criterion filter use function.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can use list_*() functions discover valid filter names server. normal use, can pass names (example university = "Ankara Üniversitesi") functions, tezr handle ID mapping internally. id columns mainly lookup keys used tezr can also pass IDs directly advanced performance-sensitive workflows (example university_id, institute_id, division_id, discipline_id) want.
code: # All universities unis <- list_universities() head(unis) #> # A tibble: 6 × 2 #>   name                                                   id    #>   <chr>                                                  <chr> #> 1 ABANT İZZET BAYSAL ÜNİVERSİTESİ                        30    #> 2 ABDULLAH GÜL ÜNİVERSİTESİ                              168   #> 3 ACIBADEM MEHMET ALİ AYDINLAR ÜNİVERSİTESİ              196   #> 4 ACIBADEM ÜNİVERSİTESİ                                  124   #> 5 ADALET BAKANLIĞI                                       62    #> 6 ADANA ALPARSLAN TÜRKEŞ BİLİM VE TEKNOLOJİ ÜNİVERSİTESİ 246 # Subjects have Turkish and English names subjects <- list_subjects() subjects |>   filter(stringr::str_detect(name_tr, "Ekonomi")) #> # A tibble: 3 × 3 #>   name_tr                                  name_en                id    #>   <chr>                                    <chr>                  <chr> #> 1 Çalışma Ekonomisi ve Endüstri İlişkileri Labour Economics and … 35    #> 2 Ekonomi                                  Economics              56    #> 3 Ev Ekonomisi                             Home Economics         64 # Other list functions (each returns 'name' and 'id' columns) institutes <- list_institutes() divisions <- list_divisions() disciplines <- list_disciplines()

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can pass university, institute, division names strings. tezr resolves internal IDs automatically via lookup mentioned .
code: # All theses from Ankara University ankara <- search_detailed(university = "Ankara Üniversitesi") # Narrow to a specific division within a university ankara_econ <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı" ) # Filter by institute sosyal_bilimler <- search_detailed(   university = "İstanbul Üniversitesi",   institute = "Sosyal Bilimler Enstitüsü" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Subjects broad categories (e.g., “Ekonometri”) whereas disciplines specializations (e.g., “İktisat Teorisi”). can use list_subjects() list_disciplines() confirm exact names.
code: # All econometrics theses econ_all <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri") # Narrow to a discipline within a subject theory <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   discipline = "İktisat Teorisi" ) # Combine discipline with university boun_theory <- search_detailed(   university = "Boğaziçi Üniversitesi",   discipline = "İktisat Teorisi" )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also filter results supervisor names.
code: # Find theses supervised by a specific supervisor supervisor_theses <- search_detailed(supervisor = "Mustafa Kadir Doğan") #> ℹ Performing detailed search... #> ✔ Found 8 results #> ✔ Returning 8 results head(supervisor_theses) #> # A tibble: 6 × 13 #>   thesis_no title_original    title_translation author university  year #>   <chr>     <chr>             <chr>             <chr>  <chr>      <int> #> 1 889302    Özel okulların, … Evaluating the p… İLKE … ANKARA ÜN…  2024 #> 2 946178    İlave çalışan et… Added worker eff… DENİZ… ANKARA ÜN…  2022 #> 3 707357    Yolsuzluğun elek… The impact of co… FUNDA… ANKARA ÜN…  2021 #> 4 621270    Elektronik ticar… Development of e… CANER… ANKARA ÜN…  2020 #> 5 631795    Ekonomide ağ mod… Network models a… ÖMER … ANKARA ÜN…  2020 #> 6 490687    İran'da bölgesel… The political ec… NASER… ANKARA ÜN…  2017 #> # ℹ 7 more variables: thesis_type_tr <chr>, thesis_type_en <chr>, #> #   language_tr <chr>, language_en <chr>, subject_tr <chr>, #> #   subject_en <chr>, detail_id <chr>

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: YÖK web portal accepts one value per filter field. tezr removes restriction. search_detailed() parameters accept character vectors. pass multiple values, package expands separate API calls, combines results, deduplicates thesis_no. makes cross-institutional cross-disciplinary comparisons possible single function call.
code: # Search across multiple universities multi_uni <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi" )  # Search multiple disciplines within a subject multi_discipline <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   discipline = c("İktisat", "Maliye", "Ekonometri") )  # Multiple thesis types multi_type <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Multiple languages (ISO 639 codes) multi_lang <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en", "fr") )  # Search across multiple universities with pagination multi_uni_all <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi",   max_search_results = Inf,   ignore_cache = TRUE )

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Search results contain core metadata (title, author, university, year, type, subject). need full details, abstracts, keywords, supervisor names, page counts, PDF links, can use detail() function.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can pass single detail_id search results detail(). function returns one-row tibble.
code: # Search and get details for the first match ankara_econ <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2024,   year_end = 2025 ) #> Warning: University "Ankara Üniversitesi" not found. Search may not filter by #> university correctly. #> Warning: Division "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı" not found. Search may not filter by #> division correctly. #> ℹ Performing detailed search... #> ✔ Found 27771 results #> ! Returning 2000 of 27771 results. Set `max_search_results = Inf` to auto-paginate and retrieve all results.  ankara_econ_details <- detail(ankara_econ$detail_id[2]) #> ℹ Fetching thesis details... #> ✔ Retrieved details for thesis  dplyr::glimpse(ankara_econ_details) #> Rows: 1 #> Columns: 24 #> $ thesis_no            <chr> "913058" #> $ title_original       <chr> "Türkiye'nin sosyo-politik dönüşümü ve S… #> $ title_translation    <chr> "Turkey's socio-political transformation… #> $ author               <chr> "MEHMET ŞİRİN BAKIR" #> $ advisor              <chr> "DOÇ. DR. IŞIL ARPACI" #> $ co_advisor           <chr> NA #> $ university           <chr> "İNÖNÜ ÜNİVERSİTESİ" #> $ institute            <chr> "SOSYAL BİLİMLER ENSTİTÜSÜ" #> $ division             <chr> "SİYASET BİLİMİ VE KAMU YÖNETİMİ ANABİLİ… #> $ year                 <chr> "2025" #> $ pages                <chr> "185" #> $ thesis_type_tr       <chr> "Doktora" #> $ thesis_type_en       <chr> "Doctorate" #> $ language_tr          <chr> "Türkçe" #> $ language_en          <chr> "Turkish" #> $ subject_tr           <chr> "Siyasal Bilimler" #> $ subject_en           <chr> "Political Science" #> $ abstract_original    <chr> "Mutlakiyetçi krallıkların ortaya çıkmas… #> $ abstract_translation <chr> "Minorities, which became a problem with… #> $ keywords_tr          <chr> NA #> $ keywords_en          <chr> NA #> $ access_status        <chr> "open" #> $ pdf_url              <chr> "https://tez.yok.gov.tr/UlusalTezMerkezi… #> $ detail_url           <chr> "https://tez.yok.gov.tr/UlusalTezMerkezi…  # English abstract ankara_econ_details$abstract_translation #> [1] "Minorities, which became a problem with the emergence of absolutist kingdoms, caused sectarian wars in Europe during the Reformation. In this period, the Ottoman Empire, which carried out a different minority policy from its contemporaries, ensured that communities lived together in tolerance thanks to the 'Millet System'. The Republic of Turkey, which was established after the collapse of the Ottoman Empire, had a trust problem towards minorities on the grounds that they collaborated with the enemy in the wars that took place in the last years of the Ottoman Empire. This situation has been reflected in state-minority relations for most of the history of the Republic. The Lausanne Peace Treaty, which determined minorities and minority rights, also determined the minority administration of Turkey. However, despite the Treaty of Lausanne, there have been problems regarding minorities in practice, and one of these problems is the exclusion of Assyrians from the minority status. Despite the definition of non-Muslim citizens as minorities in Lausanne, Assyrians could not exercise their minority rights until 2003. In this study, how the Assyrians have been affected by the social and political policies implemented from the foundation of the Republic to the present day and the socio-political problems of the Assyrians are discussed. In this context, Assyrians' relations with the state and issues such as representation, participation in politics, social relations and the phenomenon of migration are discussed, and the data obtained through empirical studies are analysed comparatively."

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also pass vector detail_id values fetch details multiple theses. function shows text progress updates default fetches uncached records parallel (5 active requests).
code: # Fetch details for all results ankara_econ <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı",   thesis_type = "phd",   year_start = 2025,   year_end = 2026 )  # Batch retrieval ankara_econ_all_details <- detail(ankara_econ$detail_id)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: functions return summary statistics tables NTC.
code: # Thesis counts by year year_stats <- stats_years() #> ℹ Fetching statistics... tail(year_stats) #> # A tibble: 6 × 8 #>    year yuksek_lisans doktora tipta_uzmanlik sanatta_yeterlik #>   <int>         <int>   <int>          <int>            <int> #> 1  2021         36462    8772           4847              151 #> 2  2022         46263   11380           5914              225 #> 3  2023         45209   13033           6842              227 #> 4  2024         47005   13947           6592              246 #> 5  2025         43142   13544           6918              258 #> 6  2026          2697     998            311               30 #> # ℹ 3 more variables: dis_hekimligi_uzmanlik <int>, #> #   tipta_yan_dal_uzmanlik <int>, toplam <int> # Thesis counts by university uni_stats <- stats_universities() head(uni_stats)  # Thesis counts by subject subject_stats <- stats_subjects() head(subject_stats)  # Total counts by thesis type type_stats <- stats_types() type_stats

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: tezr caches search results, detail records, year-range queries, lookup lists memory. Caching speeds repeated queries reduces server load.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: output includes search_count, range_count, detail_count, search_ttl, detail_ttl. Search cache defaults 3600 seconds (1 hour). Detail cache defaults NULL (session lifetime; entries stay clear restart R).
code: # Shows: enabled status, item counts, and TTL settings cache_info() #> $enabled #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $search_count #> [1] 6 #>  #> $range_count #> [1] 3 #>  #> $detail_count #> [1] 1 #>  #> $search_ttl #> [1] 3600 #>  #> $detail_ttl #> NULL

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can clear specific cache types everything . "lookups" option clears cached university/subject/division lists.
code: # Clear search results only cache_clear("searches")  # Clear detail records only cache_clear("details")  # Clear lookup lists (universities, subjects, etc.) cache_clear("lookups")  # Clear everything cache_clear("all")

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: can also adjust time--live settings disable caching entirely. TTL values seconds. NULL means entries persist entire session.
code: # 2-hour search cache, 1-week detail cache cache_config(   search_ttl = 7200,   detail_ttl = 604800 )  # Disable caching entirely (every call hits the server) cache_config(enable = FALSE)  # Re-enable with defaults cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 3600, detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Search results returned tibbles, work directly dplyr tidyverse tools. See Analysis Examples vignette complete analysis workflows visualizations.
code: climate_change <- search_basic("climate change")  # Count by year climate_change |>   dplyr::count(year)  # Filter recent PhDs climate_change |>   dplyr::filter(thesis_type_tr == "Doktora", year >= 2020) |>   dplyr::select(author, year, title_original, university)  # Most common subjects climate_change |>   dplyr::count(subject_tr, sort = TRUE) |>   dplyr::slice_head(n = 10)

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: official API. tezr scrapes <tez.yok.gov.tr> simulating browser requests parsing HTML/JavaScript responses. change portal’s page structure, form parameters, JavaScript patterns break package updated. primary fragility risk. Single-year overflow. Auto-pagination splits year ranges work around 2000-result server cap, split single calendar year. query matches 2000 theses one year, package retrieves first 2000 year issues warning. narrow search additional filters (thesis type, university, subject) avoid . -memory cache . cached data (searches, details, lookups) stored R environment objects lost session ends. can save results disk readr::write_rds() saveRDS() persistence across sessions. SSL verification disabled. YÖK server certificate issues, SSL peer verification turned (ssl_verifypeer = FALSE). security trade-required package function. Fixed rate limiting. Requests use built-2-second rate limit user-configurable, fetching large datasets still takes time. Vector parameter expansion. search_detailed() expands vector-valued parameters (e.g., multiple universities, subjects) separate API calls via cartesian product. Passing many multi-valued parameters can generate large number requests (e.g., 10 universities × 5 subjects = 50 searches). Lookup matching. list_*() lookup functions use exact substring matching. Typos minor name variations (example, missing diacritics) match. Use list_universities() related lookup functions confirm exact names searching. Metadata . package retrieves thesis metadata. PDF URLs included detail records full-text files downloaded. can use URLs download PDFs.

title: Getting Started with `tezr`
text: Cache save results. Run large queries save locally readr::write_rds(), readr::write_csv(), similar functions. reload disk later sessions. Filter paginating. Add year ranges, thesis types, institutional filters keep result sets manageable setting max_search_results = Inf. Minimize server load. Use cached results possible. Avoid repeating identical queries. Validate data quality. Metadata may inconsistencies (missing fields, encoding issues). Clean validate analysis.

title: tezr
text: tezr provides functions query Turkiye’s National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) extract metadata. Disclaimer: package affiliated , endorsed , connected YOK (Yükseköğretim Kurulu / Council Higher Education) National Thesis Center. independent tool academic research purposes.

title: tezr
code: # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("emraher/tezr")

title: tezr
text: Search results use title_original title_translation. Detail records use abstract_original abstract_translation.
code: library(tezr)

title: tezr
code: household <- search_basic(keyword = "hanehalkı") #> ℹ Initializing session... #> ℹ Searching for: "hanehalkı" #> ✔ Found 1019 results #> ✔ Returning 1019 results  dplyr::glimpse(household) #> Rows: 1,019 #> Columns: 13 #> $ thesis_no       <chr> "949991", "981164", "905554", "866224", "792466", "811… #> $ title_original   <chr> "Parasal aktarım mekanizmasının hanehalkı bilançoları… #> $ title_translation <chr> "REFLECTIONS OF MONETARY TRANSMISSION MECHANISM ON HO… #> $ author          <chr> "HALİL TANYILDIZI", "AYŞENUR KARAHASANOĞLU", "TARIK UÇ… #> $ university      <chr> "Erzincan Binali Yıldırım Üniversitesi", "Çukurova Üni… #> $ year            <int> 2025, 2025, 2024, 2024, 2023, 2023, 2023, 2022, 2022, … #> $ thesis_type_tr  <chr> "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans", "Yüksek Lisans", "Doktora"… #> $ thesis_type_en  <chr> "Doctorate", "Master", "Master", "Doctorate", "Doctora… #> $ language_tr     <chr> "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "Türkçe", "İng… #> $ language_en     <chr> "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish", "Turkish",… #> $ subject_tr      <chr> "İşletme", "Ekonomi", "Ekonometri; İşletme", "Ekonomi;… #> $ subject_en      <chr> "Business Administration", "Economics", "Econometrics;… #> $ detail_id       <chr> "h_WrLBMhp0j9Ih1Bz6_ssA", "YpbNX80LdVlVM683htrXqQ", "C…

title: tezr
text: Getting Started Analysis Examples Function Reference

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Removes cached search results, thesis details, /lookup data memory.

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
code: cache_clear(what = c("all", "searches", "details", "lookups"))

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Character. clear: "", "searches", "details", "lookups". Default "".

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
text: Invisible NULL

title: Clear the cache — cache_clear
code: # Clear everything cache_clear() #> ✔ Search cache cleared #> ✔ Detail cache cleared #> ✔ Lookup cache cleared  # Clear only search results cache_clear("searches") #> ✔ Search cache cleared  # Clear only thesis details cache_clear("details") #> ✔ Detail cache cleared

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: Controls whether search results thesis details cached memory R session. Caching can significantly speed repeated queries.

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
code: cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 3600, detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: enable Logical. Enable caching? Default TRUE. search_ttl Numeric. Search result TTL (time--live) seconds. NULL means cache lives entire session. Default 3600 (1 hour). detail_ttl Numeric. Detail page TTL seconds. NULL means cache lives entire session. Default NULL (session).

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
text: Invisible NULL

title: Configure cache behavior — cache_config
code: # Disable caching entirely cache_config(enable = FALSE)  # Enable with 30-minute TTL for searches cache_config(enable = TRUE, search_ttl = 1800)  # Cache details forever (until session ends) cache_config(detail_ttl = NULL)

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
text: Returns information current cache state, including number cached items configuration settings.

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
code: cache_info()

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
text: list cache statistics: enabled - Whether caching enabled search_count - Number cached search results range_count - Number cached year-range searches detail_count - Number cached thesis details search_ttl - Search cache TTL seconds (NULL = session) detail_ttl - Detail cache TTL seconds (NULL = session)

title: Get cache statistics — cache_info
code: cache_info() #> $enabled #> [1] TRUE #>  #> $search_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $range_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $detail_count #> [1] 0 #>  #> $search_ttl #> [1] 3600 #>  #> $detail_ttl #> NULL #>

what: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: Retrieves full details one theses Turkish National Thesis Center using encoded IDs search results.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
code: detail(detail_id, progress = TRUE, ...)

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: detail_id Character vector. encoded thesis ID(s) detail_id column search results. Required. Accepts multiple values batch retrieval. progress Logical. Show text progress updates fetching multiple theses? Default TRUE. ... Reserved internal use.

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
text: tibble thesis details (one row per thesis). Columns (order): thesis_no - Thesis number title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name advisor - Advisor name title co_advisor - Co-advisor name(s) (semicolon-separated multiple; NA absent) university - University name institute - Institute name division - Division name year - Year pages - Number pages thesis_type_tr - Thesis type Turkish (e.g., "Doktora", "Yüksek Lisans") thesis_type_en - Thesis type English (e.g., "Doctorate", "Master's") language_tr - Language Turkish (e.g., "Türkçe", "İngilizce") language_en - Language English (e.g., "Turkish", "English") subject_tr - Turkish subject classifications (semicolon-separated multiple) subject_en - English subject classifications (semicolon-separated multiple) abstract_original - Abstract thesis's original language available abstract_translation - Translated abstract available keywords_tr - Turkish keywords (includes keywords index field) keywords_en - English keywords (includes keywords index field) access_status - Access status (open/restricted) pdf_url - URL download PDF (available) detail_url - URL thesis detail page

title: Get detailed information about a thesis — detail
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for theses results <- search_basic("panel veri")  # Get details for a single thesis thesis_details <- detail(results$detail_id[1])  # Get details for multiple theses (batch) all_details <- detail(detail_id = results$detail_id)  # Without progress updates all_details <- detail(detail_id = results$detail_id, progress = FALSE) } # }

what: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: Keyword-based search common filter options. Similar basic search adds year filtering, language, group, institution, status filters. Limited 2000 results per request (server limit). results field-specific searches, use search_detailed.

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
code: search_advanced(   keyword,   search_field = c("title", "all", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index",     "abstract"),   match_type = c("exact", "contains"),   year_start = NULL,   year_end = NULL,   group = c("all", "science", "social", "medical"),   university = NULL,   university_id = NULL,   thesis_type = c("all", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry",     "medical_sub", "pharmacy"),   institute = NULL,   institute_id = NULL,   language = NULL,   access_type = c("all", "open", "restricted"),   status = c("approved", "all", "in_preparation"),   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: keyword Character. single search term. search_field Character. field search . One "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "". Default "title" (matches web advanced search form). match_type Character. Keyword matching strategy. One "exact" (matches keyword entered) "contains" (substring match). Default "exact". year_start Integer. Start year (optional). year_end Integer. End year (optional). group Character. Group filter. One "", "science" (Fen), "social" (Sosyal), "medical" (Tıp). Default "". university Character. University name (optional). provided without university_id, ID looked automatically. university_id Integer. University ID (optional). Use skip lookup match "Choose" behavior web form. thesis_type Character. Type thesis. One "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Default "". institute Character. Institute name (optional). provided without institute_id, ID looked automatically. institute_id Integer. Institute ID (optional). Use skip lookup match "Choose" behavior web form. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). access_type Character. Access type. One "", "open", "restricted". Default "". status Character. Thesis status. One "", "approved", "in_preparation". Default "approved". max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf paginate retrieve results via year-range splitting. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: tibble containing thesis records (structure search_basic).

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
text: YOK portal's advanced search form supports three keyword rows combined Boolean operators (, , ), targeting different field. function exposes first keyword row. R packages interface academic databases, rentrez (PubMed) europepmc (Europe PMC), pass Boolean logic single query string (e.g., "term1 term2"). YOK portal accept free-form Boolean strings; uses structured form fields keyword row, making pattern inapplicable . equivalent results: across fields: use search_detailed field-specific parameters (title, author, supervisor, etc.). : run separate searches combine dplyr::bind_rows() |> dplyr::distinct(). : run searches exclude dplyr::anti_join().

title: Advanced search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_advanced
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Keyword search with year filter climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015 )  # Search science theses only ml <- search_advanced(   keyword = "makine öğrenmesi",   group = "science",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search in-preparation theses ongoing <- search_advanced(   keyword = "ekonometri",   status = "in_preparation" )  # Filter by university/institute (same fields as web advanced form) odtu <- search_advanced(   keyword = "yapay zeka",   university = "Orta Doğu Teknik Üniversitesi",   institute = "Fen Bilimleri Enstitüsü" )  # Get all available results (auto-paginate) all_climate <- search_advanced(   keyword = "iklim değişikliği",   max_search_results = Inf ) } # }

what: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: Searches Turkiye's National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) database returns matching thesis records.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
code: search_basic(   keyword,   search_field = c("all", "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index",     "abstract", "thesis_no"),   access_type = c("all", "open", "restricted"),   thesis_type = c("all", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry",     "medical_sub", "pharmacy"),   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: keyword Character. search term(s). search_field Character. field search . One "title", "author", "supervisor", "subject", "index", "abstract", "", "thesis_no". Default "". access_type Character. Access type filter. One "", "open", "restricted". Default "". thesis_type Character. Type thesis search . One "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Default "". max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Set Inf automatically delegate search_advanced pagination results exceed 2000. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: tibble containing thesis records columns: thesis_no - Unique thesis identifier title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name university - University name year - Year thesis thesis_type_tr - Type thesis Turkish thesis_type_en - Type thesis English language_tr - Thesis language Turkish language_en - Thesis language English subject_tr - Turkish subject classification subject_en - English subject classification detail_id - ID fetching details

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
text: Basic search returns 2000 results per query (YOK server limit). results exceed 2000 max_search_results > 2000, search delegates search_advanced paginates via year-range splitting retrieve results. default max_search_results = 2000, warning issued suggesting max_search_results = Inf.

title: Search the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_basic
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Search for theses (returns up to 2000 results) search_results <- search_basic("hanehalkı")  # Search for PhD theses by a specific author search_results <- search_basic("Nilay Ünsal", search_field = "author", thesis_type = "masters")  # Search for open access theses search_results <- search_basic("tarım", access_type = "open")  # Get all results (auto-delegates to advanced search for pagination) all_results <- search_basic("hanehalkı", max_search_results = Inf) } # }

what: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: Searches detailed field-specific filter options. total results exceed 2000 (server limit), automatically paginates using year ranges retrieve results.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
code: search_detailed(   university = NULL,   university_id = NULL,   thesis_type = "all",   year_start = NULL,   year_end = NULL,   institute = NULL,   institute_id = NULL,   access_type = "all",   group = "all",   thesis_no = NULL,   division = NULL,   division_id = NULL,   status = "approved",   title = NULL,   discipline = NULL,   discipline_id = NULL,   language = NULL,   author = NULL,   subject = NULL,   supervisor = NULL,   keyword = NULL,   abstract = NULL,   max_search_results = 2000,   ignore_cache = FALSE )

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: university University name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple universities. university_id University ID (optional). provided, lookup university skipped. thesis_type Type(s) thesis. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple types: "", "masters", "phd", "medical_specialty", "arts", "dentistry", "medical_sub", "pharmacy". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. year_start Start year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. year_end End year (optional). Used pagination results > 2000. institute Institute name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple institutes. institute_id Institute ID (optional). provided, lookup institute skipped. access_type Access type. Default "". Accepts character vector multiple access types: "", "open", "restricted". Multiple values trigger separate searches combined. group Group filter. One "", "science", "social", "medical". Default "". thesis_no Thesis number search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple thesis numbers. division Division name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple divisions. division_id Division ID (optional). provided, lookup division skipped. status Character. Thesis status filter. One "approved", "", "in_preparation". Default "approved". title Title search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple titles. discipline Discipline name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple disciplines. discipline_id Discipline ID (optional). provided, lookup discipline skipped. language Integer language ID character label (e.g., "tr", "en", "Turkish", "İngilizce"). Accepts character vector multiple languages. author Author name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple authors. subject Subject (Konu) name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple subjects. supervisor Supervisor name (optional). Accepts character vector multiple supervisors. keyword Keyword text (Dizin) search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple keywords. abstract Abstract text search (optional). Accepts character vector multiple abstracts. max_search_results Maximum results return. Default 2000 (server limit per query). Use higher values Inf get available results via automatic pagination. ignore_cache Logical. TRUE, bypass cached search/range results fetch fresh data server.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: tibble containing thesis records columns: thesis_no - Unique thesis identifier title_original - Original title title_translation - Title translation available author - Author name university - University name year - Year thesis thesis_type_tr - Type thesis Turkish thesis_type_en - Type thesis English language_tr - Thesis language Turkish language_en - Thesis language English subject_tr - Turkish subject classification subject_en - English subject classification detail_id - ID fetching details

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
text: YOK web portal accepts single value per filter field. function extends beyond portal accepting vector-valued parameters fields. Multiple values expanded separate API calls, results combined deduplicated thesis number. total result count exceeds 2000 year range specified, function automatically uses 1959-present year range paginates retrieve results.

title: Detailed search of the Turkiye's National Thesis Center — search_detailed
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Field-specific search with year filter climate <- search_detailed(   title = "iklim değişikliği",   year_start = 2015,   year_end = 2024 )  # Title search with university filter ml_theses <- search_detailed(   title = "makine öğrenmesi",   university = "Orta Doğu Teknik Üniversitesi",   thesis_type = "phd" )  # Search by university and division search_results <- search_detailed(   university = "Ankara Üniversitesi",   division = "İktisat Ana Bilim Dalı",   year_start = 2020,   year_end = 2023 )  # Get ALL results for a subject (auto-paginates if > 2000) all_econ <- search_detailed(subject = "Ekonometri", max_search_results = Inf)  # Search for a specific supervisor's theses search_results <- search_detailed(supervisor = "Hasan Şahin")  # Search across multiple universities (automatically expands) search_results <- search_detailed(   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   subject = "Ekonomi" )  # Search multiple disciplines within a subject search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   discipline = c("İktisat", "Maliye", "Ekonometri") )  # Search for multiple specific thesis numbers search_results <- search_detailed(thesis_no = c("123456", "234567", "345678"))  # Search for multiple titles search_results <- search_detailed(   title = c("Ekonometri", "Zaman Serileri") )  # Search for multiple languages search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   language = c("tr", "en") )  # Search for multiple thesis types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Ekonomi",   thesis_type = c("phd", "masters") )  # Search for multiple access types search_results <- search_detailed(   subject = "Makine Mühendisliği",   access_type = c("open", "restricted") )  # Complex multi-parameter search search_results <- search_detailed(   author = c("Ahmet Yılmaz", "Mehmet Demir"),   university = c("Ankara Üniversitesi", "İstanbul Üniversitesi"),   year_start = 2020 ) } # }

what: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
title: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
text: Access Turkiye's National Thesis Center (Ulusal Tez Merkezi) database https://tez.yok.gov.tr. Search, retrieve, analyze dissertation metadata Turkish universities. Supports basic advanced search, thesis details retrieval, lookup tables, aggregate statistics.

title: tezr: Access the Turkiye's National Thesis Center Database — tezr-package
text: Maintainer: Emrah Er eer@eremrah.com

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: Initial release.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: search_basic() performs keyword search across search fields type access type filters. search_advanced() adds year range, language, group, university/institute, status filters keyword search. search_detailed() provides field-specific institutional filters (university, division, subject, discipline, supervisor). Accepts vector-valued parameters automatic expansion deduplication. Automatic pagination via adaptive year-range splitting results exceed 2000-result server limit. Set max_search_results = Inf retrieve matching records.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: detail() fetches full thesis metadata (bilingual titles, abstracts, keywords, advisor/co-advisor, page count, PDF URL) one theses. Supports batch retrieval parallel requests.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: list_universities(), list_institutes(), list_divisions(), list_disciplines(), list_subjects() return entity lists database name--ID mappings.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: stats_years(), stats_universities(), stats_subjects(), stats_types() return aggregate thesis counts directly portal.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: cache_config() controls -memory caching configurable TTL. cache_info() reports cache state item counts. cache_clear() removes cached searches, details, /lookups.

title: tezr 0.1.0
text: Session management automatic cookie handling refresh. Rate limiting (2-second delay requests). SSL verification disabled default due server certificate issues.
